# Mantis

Mantis extracts readable content from the current browser DOM.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/yrstm/mantis#readme): API overview, bookmarklet helper, and development commands.
- [Source](https://github.com/yrstm/mantis/blob/main/mantis.js): Runtime library entry point.
- [Tests](https://github.com/yrstm/mantis/blob/main/test.js): Contract coverage for extraction, structured output, Markdown, HTML, and bookmarklet behavior.
- [Benchmarks](https://github.com/yrstm/mantis/blob/main/benchmark.js): Fixed fixture evaluation for extraction quality.

## Package

- CommonJS entry: `mantis.js`
- Runtime dependencies: none
